---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_esp32_order
alias: house_mesh_esp32_order
purchased_on: 2025-12-05
total_eur: 44
counterparty: 深圳市海云电子
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Foundry
lines:
  - item: ESP32-C3 dev boards
    quantity: 4
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 32
  - item: relay modules
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 6
    line_eur: 12
---
# ESP32 and relay board batch

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_esp32_order |
| alias          | house_mesh_esp32_order      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-05                  |
| total_eur      | 44                          |
| counterparty   | 深圳市海云电子                     |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Foundry                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | ESP32-C3 dev boards | 4   | 8        | 32       |
| 2 | relay modules       | 2   | 6        | 12       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL               |     |          | 44       |
+---+---------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Cheap experimental hardware order that sat in the drawer until House Mesh became a named cleanup lane.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction explicitly requested OCR for all Foundry-related bills. The canonical preflight for this inbox item identified exactly three related purchase records, all of which were read and updated with schema-compliant bill frontmatter while retaining original content, then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
